steps.speaker: Narrator
steps.text: The talayot of Son Fornes, Mallorca. A warm afternoon under the Mediterranean sun.

steps.speaker: Narrator
steps.text: Ramon, a talayotic foner, naps against the ancient stones. Nearby, his myotragus companion Bep grazes.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: *munch munch*

steps.speaker: Narrator
steps.text: Bep wanders toward an old altar, half-hidden among the rocks. Strange herbs grow around it.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Ooh, these smell nice...

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: *chomp*

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: WHO DARES DEFILE MY ALTAR?!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: ...what.

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: Your wretched beast has devoured my sacred herbs! Do you have ANY idea how long those take to grow?!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: He's a myotragus. He eats things. That's what he does.

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: SILENCE! Your beast shall carry a piece of my fire for this offense. Every dimoni on this island will sense him now!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Ramon! RAMON! I can TALK! ...Why can I talk?!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: This is bad! This is very bad! I can feel something burning inside me! What did he DO to me?!

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: Consider it a gift. Or a curse. Either way, you will both suffer for this. Now get out of my sight!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Ramon, what do we do?! He cursed me! I'm a TALKING GOAT now!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: Great.

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: This is your fault, Bep.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: MY fault?! You were supposed to be watching me!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: I was napping.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: ...So what now?

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: Now we walk. And you stop eating things.
